attacking_style: Commits to extremely long-range breakaway efforts (190+ km) and willing to launch hopeless solo attacks from disintegrating break remnants inside final 5km when group cohesion fails.
team_tactics: Team prioritizes visibility and brand exposure over result optimization, deploying rider in doomed breakaways where stage win probability is effectively zero.
terrain_preference: Insufficient data to determine specific terrain preferences; single observation from flat/rolling Giro stage shows endurance capacity for all-day efforts.
vulnerability: Tactical positioning in breakaways that lack winning potential; commits full energy to efforts with no realistic outcome, suggesting poor race situation assessment or team directives overriding personal chances.
key_patterns: Willing to execute 190+ km breakaway efforts with minimal win probability for team visibility.
Launches solo attacks from collapsing breakaway groups inside final 5km despite hopeless gaps.
Team strategy prioritizes sponsor exposure over optimizing rider's actual result potential.
form_trajectory: unknown: Single observation shows strong endurance capacity but no meaningful results data to assess competitive form trend.
